name: cold_morning_warm_day_no_breach
description: Cold night (62F) into a warm day (72F peak) that stays within the comfort band. Heat fires at 6 AM to close the comfort-floor gap, then classification sets HVAC off once indoor reaches comfort_heat. Windows open when outdoor drops below indoor in the evening.
notes: Covers the Heatâ†’Offâ†’NatVent transition pattern not covered by existing golden scenarios.
The warm-day comfort-floor guard ensures heat runs until indoor >= comfort_heat before HVAC goes off.
No ceiling breach occurs â€” indoor never exceeds comfort_cool=74F â€” so the ODE ceiling guard is dormant all day.
This is a gap-filling scenario: warm-day classification does NOT mean instant shutoff when indoor is below the comfort floor.

events.note: Cold night â€” indoor 65F is well below comfort_heat=70F; outdoor 52F
Warm-day classification: hvac_mode=off. But indoor=65F < comfort_heat=70F â€” comfort-floor guard fires heat instead.
Heat has warmed indoor to 70.5F, above comfort_heat=70F. HVAC off now appropriate.
30-min classification re-evaluation: indoor=70.5F >= comfort_heat=70F â€” HVAC off applied normally.
Evening: indoor 72F, outdoor 65F (outdoor < indoor). Windows eligible for nat vent.
User opens window â€” outdoor 65F < indoor 72F, indoor > comfort_heat=70F, outdoor < threshold 77F.

assertions.reason: Cold morning, indoor below comfort_heat on a warm day — heat to the comfort floor first (warm_day_comfort_gap) so the occupant is not left cold.

Second cycle: thermostat is running (heated at 06:01) and the day is warming — apply a warm-day setback to the running thermostat (Issue #96) rather than abruptly switching off. Occupant-correct; production is source of truth.
Evening sensor_open: outdoor=65F < indoor=72F, indoor=72F > comfort_heat=70F, outdoor=65F <= threshold 74+3=77F â€” nat vent activates.

verdict.summary: Cold-morning warm-day cycle stays within comfort band; nat-vent activates in evening when outdoor drops below indoor
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied at 6 AM (guard not modeled in simulator) â†’ classification_applied at 8 AM after indoor recovers â†’ natural_ventilation at 6 PM
verdict.expected_behavior: Heat fires until indoor >= comfort_heat, then HVAC off; evening nat-vent when outdoor < indoor
